### Summary Table {#sec-summary}

| Object | Simultaneous | ML (Mgmt First) | LM (Labor First) |
|---|---|---|---|
| Information used by $M$ | Prior only | Prior only | Observed $x_L$ reveals type |
| Equilibrium form | Bayes--Nash | Same as simultaneous | Unique separating PBE; pooling impossible |
| $x_M$ | $\dfrac{V^2\kappa^2}{4}$ | $\dfrac{V^2\kappa^2}{4}$ | $\dfrac{V_t(2V-V_t)}{4V}$ |
| $x_L$ | $\dfrac{V\kappa}{2}\sqrt{V_t} - \dfrac{V^2\kappa^2}{4}$ | same as simultaneous | $\dfrac{V_t^2}{4V}$ |
| $U_L$ | $\left(\sqrt{V_t} - \dfrac{V\kappa}{2}\right)^{\!2}$ | same as simultaneous | $\dfrac{V_t^2}{4V}$ |
| $U_M$ | $\dfrac{V^2\kappa}{2\sqrt{V_t}} - \dfrac{V^2\kappa^2}{4}$ | same as simultaneous | $\dfrac{(2V-V_t)^2}{4V}$ |
| $\E[U_L]$ | $\mu - V\kappa\nu + \dfrac{V^2\kappa^2}{4}$ | same as simultaneous | $\dfrac{\mu^2+\delta^2}{4V}$ |
| $\E[U_M]$ | $\dfrac{V^2\kappa^2}{4}$ | $\dfrac{V^2\kappa^2}{4}$ | $\dfrac{4V^2-4V\mu+\mu^2+\delta^2}{4V}$ |
| Labor's timing incentive | -- | $R_t > 0$ means type $t$ prefers waiting | $R_t < 0$ means type $t$ prefers moving first |
| Binary-type implication | -- | -- | Only three cases: both first, only low waits, or both wait |

: Equilibrium Outcomes Under Binary Private Values {#tbl-summary}
